# Duke Saputra

> Personal website and project portfolio for Duke Saputra, a student at Warwick Business School.

## Website: https://saputra.co.uk

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://saputra.co.uk/) — Contact links, social profiles, and vCard download
- [Projects](https://saputra.co.uk/projects) — Portfolio of web tools and applications
- [CV](https://saputra.co.uk/cv) — Curriculum vitae with experience, education, and skills
- [Updates](https://saputra.co.uk/updates) — Blog posts and technical articles
- [Links](https://saputra.co.uk/links) — Curated collection of useful links

## Projects
- [menuva](https://menuva.co.uk) — Digital restaurant menu platform
- [ClearView](https://saputra.co.uk/clearview/) — Screenshot prettifier
- [CodeGen](https://saputra.co.uk/codegen/) — QR, barcode, and Aztec code generator
- [ImageOpt](https://saputra.co.uk/imageopt/) — JPEG and PNG image optimizer
- [MockupGen](https://saputra.co.uk/mockup/) — iPhone mockup generator
- [Palit](https://saputra.co.uk/palit/) — Color palette generator
- [Clip](https://saputra.co.uk/clip/) — Clipboard text manager
- [Parsely](https://saputra.co.uk/parsely/) — Email, number, and link extractor
- [Lorip](https://saputra.co.uk/lorip/) — Lorem ipsum generator
- [Wrighter](https://saputra.co.uk/wrighter/) — Minimal plain text editor
- [Arbit](https://saputra.co.uk/arbit/) — Random picker tool
- [NumGen](https://saputra.co.uk/numgen/) — UK phone number generator
- [Clock](https://saputra.co.uk/time/) — Minimal 8KB clock

## Contact
- Email: duke@saputra.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/dukedj
- Location: Warwick Business School, UK
